description_long: This kiosk is a small, square structure with dark wood-paneled exterior walls and metallic corner trims, giving it a rustic yet sturdy appearance. The front features a single door with a printed sign reading 'Farm to Table' and a colorful produce illustration, suggesting a market or food-related function. Large, vibrant photographic signage depicting fresh vegetables is mounted on two adjacent exterior walls, enhancing its visual appeal and drawing attention. The kiosk is open-topped, lacking a roof, and has no visible windows, creating an airy, accessible interior. The door is slightly ajar, indicating an entry point for customers or staff. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on natural materials and clear, inviting signage.
description: A rustic, wood-paneled kiosk with metal trim, open top, and colorful produce signage, featuring a single door and prominent 'Farm to Table' sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open door with a 'Farm to Table' sign and a large produce photo on the right wall.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the open entryway, side produce signage, and the absence of a roof.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying both large produce signage and the main 'Farm to Table' sign, with the door less visible.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the produce signage and the open side entry, with the door seen from behind.
attribute_signage_type: Printed signs; one above the door with 'Farm to Table' text and produce illustration, and large photographic produce banners on two side panels.
attribute_door_configuration: Single hinged door at the front, partially open.
attribute_roof_design: No roof; open-topped with visible wood panel edges.
